message:
Fix assistant header visibility, improve expand/collapse UX

- First assistant message after a user message now correctly shows
  the Assistant header with model name (was being hidden as continuation)
- "show all" → "show N more lines" on its own line
- Both ResultBox and DataView ExpandableString use consistent pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
